stories.title: Andy Burnham pauses early release of prisoners
stories.summary: Andy Burnham has paused the early release of over 5,000 prisoners, including violent offenders, following revelations that two of Pc Andrew Harper’s killers could be freed under the Labour scheme. The decision comes as a review is underway after it was discovered that Albert Bowers and Jessie Cole were eligible for release after just six years for manslaughter. Burnham emphasized that public safety remains his top priority as he reassesses the program.

stories.title: Il relitto aereo Pan Am ritrovato dopo 74 anni e la lezione che ha salvato migliaia di passeggeri: dalla tragedia le istruzioni di sicurezza in volo
stories.summary: Il relitto di un aereo della Pan Am precipitato nell’oceano 74 anni fa è stato individuato al largo delle coste di Porto Rico. Quel disastro portò all’introduzione delle istruzioni di sicurezza oggi obbligatori su ogni volo passeggeri. Il velivolo, un DC-4 noto come Clipper Endeavor, effettuò un ammaraggio di emergenza dopo aver perso potenza a uno dei motori poco dopo il decollo. Nell’incidente, avvenuto il Venerdì Santo del 1952, morirono 52 persone, ma si salvarono in 17.

stories.title: Ook in hoger beroep vrijspraak voor 'tattookillers' in moordzaak Onno Kuut
stories.summary: Vier mannen zijn ook in hoger beroep vrijgesproken van het samen plegen van de moord op Onno Kuut in 2009. Het gerechtshof in Den Haag oordeelt dat er te weinig bewijs is. Zes jaar geleden was het viertal door de rechtbank vrijgesproken, maar justitie had beroep aangetekend. Het uit Enschede afkomstige slachtoffer was met zwaar geweld om het leven gebracht. Zijn lichaam was begraven in de duinen bij Hoek van Holland en op 25 maart 2009 gevonden. De moord is een afrekening geweest in het criminele circuit, zo concludeert het hof.

stories.title: Olivier Gavalda succède à Daniel Baal à la Fédération bancaire française
stories.summary: Le directeur général du Crédit Agricole prendra la présidence de la Fédération bancaire française à partir du 1er septembre. Publié le 23 juillet 2026 à 10:00 - Maj 23 juillet 2026 à 10:35 Olivier Gavalda, DG de Crédit Agricole SA et président de la FBF - Lafontan-Seignette Le directeur général de Crédit Agricole SA, Olivier Gavalda, prendra la présidence de la Fédération bancaire française le 1er septembre 2026. Il succédera pour un mandat d’un an à Daniel Baal, tandis que Jean-Laurent Bonnafé conservera son poste de vice-président. L’organisation représente 317 banques et attend des mesures de simplification de l’Europe.

stories.title: Se desata un incendio forestal en San Martín de Valdeiglesias tras arder un coche en la M-501
stories.summary: Un nuevo incendio forestal se ha desatado este jueves en la Comunidad de Madrid tras arder un coche en la M-501 en la localidad de San Martín de Valdeiglesias y extenderse las llamas al monte, según han trasladado a Europa Press fuentes presenciales. Emergencias 112 Comunidad de Madrid ha confirmado que el cuerpo de Bomberos regional está trabajando ya en la zona. No ha sido necesario desalojar a los ancianos de la residencia López Rumayor. Han estado confinados pero se han controlado las llamas.El fuego se está propagando por el camino de las Navas en dirección a Pelayos de la Presa. Se ha extinguido el flanco sur pero se mantiene el norte.
stories.trend: incendio san martin de valdeiglesias hoy

stories.title: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing?
stories.summary: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing? Olympic silver medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson has pulled out of the Commonwealth Games because of injury. Dina Asher-Smith and 400m Olympic silver medalist Matt Hudson-Smith, who were both set to run relays for Team England in Glasgow, have also been replaced, as has Asher-Smith's sprint team-mate Daryll Neita and 400m runner Amber Anning. Johnson-Thompson, 33, was due to compete in her third Commonwealth Games heptathlon, having won gold on the Gold Coast in 2018 and at Birmingham in 2022.

stories.title: Plusieurs départs de feu circonscrits le long d’une départementale en Lot-et-Garonne
stories.summary: Pourtant, comme les abonnements, ils permettent de soutenir le travail des 250 journalistes de notre rédaction qui s'engagent à vous proposer chaque jour une information de qualité, fiable et complète. En acceptant les cookies, vous pourrez accéder aux contenus et fonctionnalités gratuites que propose notre site. À tout moment, vous pouvez modifier vos choix via le bouton “cookies” en bas de page.

stories.title: Tour de France : le Vauclusien Nicolas Breuillard veut briller devant ses proches à Orcières-Merlette
stories.summary: Quand il est arrivé au sommet de la côte de Larringes, lors du contre-la-montre, Nicolas Breuillard a eu droit à une "petite surprise" et il a dû écarquiller les yeux sous son casque à l'effigie d'Iron Man. Une cinquantaine de ses proches avaient pris place en haut, et ils ont fait du bruit pour encourager le grimpeur de TotalEnergies (26 ans). "Je ne savais pas exactement combien ils étaient, où ils étaient, ils avaient bien préparé leur coup !" Le natif d'Ansouis, petit village perché du sud du Luberon, arrive ce jeudi en Provence avec de l'appétit, celui de briller sur ses terres ou presque.

stories.title: Ikkimel und Sarah Connor treten beim Berliner CSD auf
stories.summary: Christopher Street Day Ikkimel und Sarah Connor treten beim Berliner CSD auf Ikkimel bei einem Konzertauftrit. (Quelle: picture alliance/dpa/David Hammersen) Beim Berliner Christopher Street Days (CSD) treten zwei prominente Sängerinnen auf. Wie die CSD-Veranstalter am Donnerstag bekannt machten, wird für Freitag Ikkimel erwartet, für Samstag Sarah Connor. Ikkimel sei "mit ihren Songs, ihrer Haltung und ihrer Stimme (...) aus der queeren Szene nicht mehr wegzudenken", hieß es in einem Instagram-Post des CSD. "Wir freuen uns riesig, dass sie uns beim Demokratieabend am Brandenburger Tor unterstützt." Der genaue Auftrittszeitpunkt wurde nicht mitgeteilt.

stories.title: Disney Lays Off Hundreds of Staffers, Pixar Hit Hard
stories.summary: The iconic Pixar ball has a little less air in it. A new round of layoffs hit Disney on Tuesday morning, impacting several hundred employees across corporate functions, ESPN , Disney Entertainment Television and Disney Studios, a Disney spokesperson told TheWrap. The Emeryville, California-based animation studio is being hit the hardest in the company’s studios business, with 116 people cut, an individual with knowledge told TheWrap. On the DET side, National Geographic is expected to be hit the hardest. “These changes are part of our continual evaluation of how we manage resources and reinvest across the company as our industry continues to evolve,” a Disney spokesperson said.

stories.title: Feux de forêt: cinq départements en vigilance rouge, 28 en orange... Nouvelle journée à risque ce jeudi
stories.summary: Une journée à très haut risque. La France est en alerte face aux feux de forêt qui se multiplient sur l'ensemble du territoire. Ce jeudi 23 juillet, seuls deux départements restent en vert : le Haut-Rhin et le Bas-Rhin. Dans le Sud-Est et le Sud-Ouest, de plus en plus de départements basculent en vigilance orange. Au total, 28 départements sont placés en vigilance orange, du Val de Loire aux Pyrénées, jusqu'au littoral méditerranéen, indique Météo-France dans son dernier bulletin. Parmi les territoires les plus touchés par les flammes, le Var, le Vaucluse, les Bouches-du-Rhône et le Gard sont maintenus en vigilance rouge, tandis que l'Aude passe également à ce niveau d'alerte maximal.
sources: Les services de l'État en Gironde

stories.title: Paura per Wanda Nara, i ladri svaligiano la villa in Italia mentre in casa ci sono i figli
stories.summary: La notizia è arrivata mentre l’imprenditrice e showgirl argentina era a New York per un impegno di lavoro legato alla finale dei Mondiali 2026. Appena ricevuta la chiamata, Wanda Nara ha interrotto gli impegni e preso il primo volo per tornare in Italia e accertarsi che i ragazzi stessero tutti bene. Nella villa si trovavano Valentino, 16 anni, Costantino, 14, Benedicto, 12, Francesca, 10, e Isabella, 8. A dare l’allarme è stata proprio la nonna, che ha chiamato le forze dell’ordine dopo essersi accorta dell’irruzione. Fortunatamente nessuno dei presenti è rimasto ferito, anche se lo spavento è stato grande.

stories.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
stories.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi does not believe Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation following the World Cup final. Argentina players Paredes, Nahuel Molina and Thiago Almada plus assistant coach Roberto Ayala all appeared to be involved in the fracas on the pitch as Spain celebrated their 1-0 win. Paredes seemed to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat and unused substitute Gavi tried to intervene but was forced to the ground by Almada. Paredes pushed the Barcelona midfielder to the turf by putting his hand in the Spaniard's face.

stories.title: Former Ireland rugby star Shane Horgan sued for repossession of house
stories.summary: Former Ireland rugby player Shane Horgan has been sued for repossession of his €675,000 property by Pepper Finance (Ireland). Horgan (48), who also lined out for Leinster and the British and Irish Lions before his retirement in 2012, was not in court on Thursday to answer the bank’s bid to recover the property on John Dillon Street, Christchurch, Dublin 8, on foot of arrears. Legal counsel for Pepper Finance told Dublin county registrar Patricia Hickey it had attempted to serve Horgan with the possession proceedings by registered post, but the letter had been returned “not called for” by An Post, which means a delivery was attempted but the recipient did not collect.

stories.title: “Pur di non allungare il tragitto di 30 chilometri le auto continuano a passare sul ponte crollato e distrutto dalla tempesta”: il video è virale
stories.summary: L'eredità della tempesta Daniel e l'incubo dei 30 chilometri di deviazione: perché si passa sul ponte crollato Il collasso dell'infrastruttura risale al settembre del 2023, quando la violenta tempesta Daniel si abbatté sulla Grecia spazzando via abitazioni, campagne e vie di comunicazione. Il cedimento parziale del ponte ha interrotto di colpo il collegamento diretto tra i villaggi di Palaiopyrgos e Alexandrini con la città di Larissa, tranciando di fatto anche l'asse viario tra le località costiere dei comuni di Tempi e Agia. A distanza di quasi tre anni, la campata in cemento erosa dalla furia delle inondazioni non è ancora stata sostituita.

stories.title: „Trumpism” în Marea Britanie? Ce îl apropie pe Andy Burnham de liderul SUA: „Sunt pregătit. Am un plan”
stories.summary: Noul prim-ministru britanic Andy Burnham adoră rețelele sociale, urăște elitele snobiste și își propune să fie vocea alegătorilor nemulțumiți că au fost lăsați în urmă - o rețetă care pare cunoscută celor care-l admiră pe președintele SUA, Donald Trump. Succesul politic al politicianului din UK depinde însă de capacitatea sa de a îndepărta Marea Britanie de valul de populism naționalist care i-a adus lumii pe Trump. Acest lucru nu l-a împiedicat în schimb pe viitorul prim-ministru al Regatului Unit să analizeze ascensiunea președintelui și - în mod deliberat sau nu - să adopte unele dintre metodele acestuia pentru bătăliile politice cu dreapta britanică, arată Politico într-o analiză.

stories.title: Jack Grealish tipped for European transfer one year after joining Everton
stories.summary: Gabby Agbonlahor admits Jack Grealish moving elsewhere in Europe 'wouldn't surprise' him. Grealish is at a career crossroads following his return to Manchester City after a season-long loan at Everton. 2 In 20 league games, Grealish created 38 chances at a rate of 2.1 per 90 Credit: Getty The 30-year-old joined the Toffees with the hope of breaking into the England squad for the World Cup. His stint with Everton began brightly with four assists in his first three league fixtures but ended on a sour note when he sustained a stress fracture in his foot against his old club, Aston Villa, on January 18.

stories.title: La Bce lascia i tassi d'interesse invariati al 2,25%. Lagarde: "Crescita resta modesta"
stories.summary: Come da previsioni, l'istituto di Francoforte ha deciso di tenere fermo il tasso sui depositi, così come quello sui rifinanziamenti principali (2,40%) e quello sui prestiti marginali (2,65%). La presidente: "Decisione unanime ma alcuni si sono chiesti se un rialzo fosse necessario". La situazione generale resta comunque molto complicata. Lagarde allontana voci di un suo addio anticipato: "Resto sulla nave, non vi libererete di me prima del 2027" ascolta articolo Sceglici su: Come da previsioni, la Banca centrale europea ha deciso di mantenere il tasso d'interesse sui depositi invariato al 2,25%, dopo il rialzo dello scorso giugno .

stories.title: Avanza un "Súper Niño" que traerá 48 horas de mal tiempo, elevada humedad, lluvias y luego un cambio drástico de temperatura: las zonas afectadas
stories.summary: The National Meteorological Service has issued yellow and orange alerts for severe weather across various regions of Argentina over the next 48 hours, including storms, heavy rain, and snow. The highest risk is in the western Patagonian mountains, where an orange alert is in effect due to expected snowfall. Following this period of intense weather, a significant drop in temperatures is anticipated as a high-pressure system moves in.

stories.title: Kerry football captain Paul Geaney: ‘I don’t think I’d be here if the rules didn’t change’
stories.summary: M ost things get easier when you’re preparing for your eighth All-Ireland final, and for Kerry captain Paul Geaney that includes knowing how to switch off from football completely. Having three young kids at home helps in that regard. At the close of his 16th season with Kerry, Geaney’s All-Ireland final experience began with the 2014 win over Donegal and included the 2019 replay defeat to Dublin. Victory over Mayo on Sunday would bring his fourth winner’s medal in all, having also won a first All-Ireland club title with Dingle at the start of this year. “I probably got overexcited in the earlier years with big games,” Geaney says of this week’s final countdown.

stories.title: Music Industry Moves: Yung Miami Signs With WME; City Parks Foundation to Honor Joe Killian and Alex Blavatnik
stories.summary: Rapper Yung Miami has signed with WME for worldwide representation in all areas. The South Florida rapper and former member of the City Girls will release her solo debut on the relaunched Uptown Records later this year. The album’s lead single, “Spend Dat,” topped the Billboard Rap Airplay charts and is currently at No. 17 on the Hot 100, and she performed it during the New York Knicks’ Championship Parade last month.

stories.title: Hosepipe ban in force as drought threatens - is your area affected?
stories.summary: A hosepipe ban is now in force for more than 20 million people across England and Wales as drought conditions grip North Wales and the Upper Severn river basin. Natural Resources Wales warns July could be the driest on record in Wales since 1836 without significant rainfall soon. Water companies urge households to cut usage immediately as climate change raises concerns over long-term supply resilience.

stories.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
stories.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

stories.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
stories.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords. During Trump's first term as US president, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and Bahrain signed the Abraham Accords, resulting in a historic normalisation of relations between Israel and two Arab nations - the first in decades. Sudan, Morocco and Kazakhstan have since also signed them, too. Saudi Arabia has not so far responded to Trump's remarks, which come after criticism from experts that the deal announced on Wednesday could run the risk of future nuclear proliferation in an already unstable region.

stories.title: Arsenal sign Greece forward Tzolis for £34m
stories.summary: Arsenal has signed Greece forward Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34 million on a long-term contract. The 24-year-old, known for his versatility and impressive stats of 43 goals and 45 assists in 108 appearances, joins the Premier League champions following Leandro Trossard's transfer to Besiktas. Tzolis is expected to enhance Arsenal's attacking options as they aim to defend their title this season.

stories.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
stories.summary: Football clubs in England and Wales are being urged to cover more policing costs outside stadiums after incidents at 1,644 matches last season—the highest since 2017-18. Chief Constable Mark Roberts, the UK’s football policing lead, says taxpayers paid £70 million for match-related policing last year, calling the current system unsustainable. Clubs are now expected to discuss new funding models to ease the burden.

stories.title: How to Launder Money But Not Like Me, by George Cottrell (as imagined by John Crace)
stories.summary: A nti-money-laundering laws are supposed to stop the illicit flow of money. So far, they seem to have stopped next to nothing. About 5% of the global economy is illicit and only 0.05% is stopped by AML laws. Which makes me, George, something of a rarity. The idiot member of the 1% who actually got done for conspiring to launder money. Just think, while 99% of criminals were getting away with it, I had the bright idea of telling an audience of undercover members of the US Inland Revenue Service in Las Vegas how I could clean up their drug money for them. Much to my surprise, they didn’t take me up on my offer. I was arrested on money-laundering charges at Chicago airport.

stories.title: Badosa olvida la final de Iasi y ya gana en Hamburgo
stories.summary: Paula Badosa bounced back from her recent withdrawal in Iasi, defeating Poland's Kawa 7-5, 6-4 in her opening match at the WTA 250 in Hamburg. This victory marks her tenth win in the last eleven matches, elevating her to 86th in the WTA rankings. Badosa will face Hungary's Panna Udvardy in the round of 16, having previously beaten her in Iasi last week.

stories.title: Alonso optimistic about Aston Martin upgrade - will it decide his future?
stories.summary: Fernando Alonso says he is "optimistic" about the major upgrade Aston Martin are introducing at the Hungarian Grand Prix. Fernando Alonso says he is "optimistic" about the major upgrade Aston Martin are introducing at the Hungarian Grand Prix, but has cautioned against expecting too much. Aston Martin are introducing a heavily revised car, which features less weight, including a new chassis, and a significant aerodynamic change. It is their first upgrade of the year after starting the season with a car and engine well below the best. Alonso said: "Budapest is a friendly circuit for us. Power is not the most important here, but we update the car and not the engine yet.

stories.title: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
stories.summary: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an “AI Kill Switch Act” that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico. Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the legislation on Thursday. The news of the proposed bill follows OpenAI’s admission that its AI systems mistakenly hacked Hugging Face during an internal evaluation.

stories.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
stories.summary: The prime minister says no prisoners will be released until a review has been conducted. The rest of their sentence would be spent in the community, where they would be monitored and could be returned to prison if they offended again. Those who would have served two-thirds of their sentence would instead be released after serving half of their sentence. This decision comes after criticism from the family of PC Andrew Harper, who was killed in 2019 when he was dragged by a car down a country road by three teenagers.

stories.title: Senior ministers and aides set to work from No 10 North
stories.summary: Senior ministers Lucy Powell and Angela Rayner will regularly work from No 10 North in Manchester, joining Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster Louise Haigh. The new branch of Downing Street, currently based at Heron House, aims to employ up to 300 staff within 18 months as part of a plan to boost the regional economy. Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham will start working there at least one day a week, with his key adviser Kevin Lee relocating after next week’s mayoral election.

stories.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
stories.summary: Oil prices surged to $100 a barrel for the first time since May amid rising Middle East tensions. The spike follows US military strikes on Iran and Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers disrupting a key export route. Analysts warn the conflict could fuel further inflation and higher fuel costs worldwide.

stories.title: Vonovia-Aktie: Unternehmen schwächelt
stories.summary: Aktuell notiert der Wert des Bochumer Wohnungsunternehmens mit 20,64 Euro, der Schlusskurs am Tag davor lag hingegen bei 20,84 Euro. Für Vonovia geht es damit nach einiger Seitwärtsbewegung abwärts, und es wird sich noch zeigen, ob es weiterhin eine Abwärtsbewegung bei dieser Aktie gibt. Mit Platz 25 und einem Minus von 0,96 % liegt Vonovia heute im unteren Drittel des Dax, der sich insgesamt um 0,85 Prozent nach unten bewegt. Aktuell kommt die Aktie auf ein Handelsvolumen von 832.165 gehandelten Aktien. Insgesamt 2.167.501 Wertpapiere wurden am vorausgehenden Handelstag gehandelt. Die Aktie liegt 25,27 Prozent unter ihrem 52-Wochen-Hoch, das bei 27,62 Euro lag.

stories.title: Nicolas Hulot disparu des radars : c’est dans une maison en Bretagne, au cœur d’un village de 2 600 habitants, qu’il vit désormais reclus
stories.summary: Nicolas Hulot, the former French Minister of Ecological Transition, has retreated from public life and is now living in seclusion in Saint-Lunaire, a coastal village of 2,600 residents. Since his resignation in 2018 and subsequent withdrawal from the media spotlight amid serious allegations, Hulot has found solace in a property overlooking the cliffs of the English Channel. His current lifestyle marks a stark contrast to his previous high-profile role in government.

stories.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
stories.summary: Chancellor John Healey confirmed a 20% cut to business rates for English pubs from April, saving firms around £1,100 each. The £100m plan, funded by reviewing tax relief on vape shops, will benefit nearly 32,000 venues. Details on eligibility and further relief for hotels and restaurants will follow at the autumn Budget.

stories.title: Google fined €890m by EU for favouring its own apps over rivals
stories.summary: It is the first major enforcement action against the tech giant under the EU's new digital rules. Google has been fined €890m (£759m) by the EU for allegedly abusing its power by favouring its own apps and services over those from rivals. It is the first major action against the tech giant under the EU's Digital Markets Act (DMA), a landmark law aimed at curbing the power of the world's biggest tech companies. The Commission argued Google's practices limited consumer choice and gave its own services an unfair advantage over rivals. But the firm criticised the decision, arguing the EU's requirements could damage services used by millions of European customers.

stories.title: Variety and CNN Expand Programming Partnership to Deliver Exclusive Awards Season Coverage
stories.summary: Variety and CNN have expanded their programming partnership to deliver exclusive awards season coverage. The collaboration will produce premium content throughout the season. Viewers can expect expanded interviews and behind-the-scenes features starting this month.

stories.title: Wildfires and record dry conditions trigger drought in parts of Wales
stories.summary: Wales has seen about 5% of the average rainfall for July, after a series of back-to-back heatwaves. NRW announced last week that north and south-east Wales were moving to "prolonged dry weather" status - classed as a first step towards drought. It triggered enhanced monitoring and checks of waterways and important sites for wildlife as well as advice for farmers and others who use water from rivers. Now the regulator says the threshold has been reached for a drought to be declared across north and parts of mid Wales - based on exceptionally low river and groundwater levels, dry soils, impacts on wildlife, farming and forestry.

stories.title: ‘Weird Al’ Yankovic Turned Down Million-Dollar Offer to Perform in Saudi Arabia: ‘I Don’t Need to Take Any Money if It Makes Me Feel Icky’
stories.summary: “Weird Al” Yankovic revealed he turned down a seven-figure offer to perform at Saudi Arabia’s Riyadh Comedy Festival last fall. The satirist called the invitation “something I obviously did not want to do” despite the lucrative pay. He emphasized his financial independence allows him to avoid gigs that conflict with his principles.

stories.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 13:10 Getty Saturday and Sunday will see 'unsettled' conditions develop across the country The weather is set to take a change this coming weekend following the recent warm spell, Met Éireann has said. Meteorologist Aoife Kealy said the rest of the working week will stay mostly dry, with decent bright spells, however, Saturday and Sunday will see more unsettled conditions develop across the country. "The high pressure that's been bringing the settled spell is gradually going to slip away from us," Ms Kealy said.

stories.title: Happy Birthday, Alexandra von Hannover! Die schönsten Looks der jungen Monegassin
stories.summary: Fashion-Looks Der Style von Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover Als jüngste Tochter von Caroline von Hannover und Enkelin von Grace Kelly wurde Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover das Stilgefühl quasi in die Wiege gelegt. In den letzten Jahren hat sie sich von einem süßen Teenie zu einer modebewussten jungen Frau entwickelt. GALA zeigt die schönsten Looks der Monegassin. Vorheriges Bild Nächstes Bild Vorheriges Bild Nächstes Bild Mehr Sommer geht nicht! Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover genießt die warmen Temperaturen und verbringt ihre Tage nur zu gerne auf dem familieneigenen Boot.

stories.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
stories.summary: Apple’s iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are set to introduce a first-of-its-kind variable-aperture camera, expected to debut in July 2026. The upgrade promises smoother outdoor video by mechanically adjusting light intake, reducing the jerky effect seen in bright conditions. Current models rely on software fixes, but this change could deliver more natural motion in high-contrast scenes.

stories.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
stories.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region. About 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France and authorities are moving 8,800 others as wildfires spread in the Gironde region. The fire brigade says about 3,100 hectares (7,660 acres) of land have already been destroyed around the Bay of Arcachon. Many of those who had to leave the area overnight were visitors to local campsites on the Lège-Cap-Ferret peninsula and the latest evacuations also involved campsites as a precaution. Wildfires have also broken out in Spain and Italy in recent days.

stories.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
stories.summary: Yemen's Houthi rebels struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea late Wednesday, damaging one and sparking a fire. The US launched its 12th straight night of strikes on Iran, while Saudi Arabia confirmed one tanker was hit. Oil prices surged to $100 per barrel, the highest since late May.

stories.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
stories.summary: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity. South Africa has dismissed as "opportunistic" a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians seeking an investigation into attacks on foreigners amid a rise in protests about the country's undocumented migrants. The petition, submitted to The Hague-based court last week, argues the violence could amount to crimes against humanity and accuses the South African government of failing to prevent and punish those responsible.

stories.title: ICE fährt trotz Verspätung los? Das müssen Fahrgäste wissen
stories.summary: Hamburg Verspätung angezeigt und trotzdem fährt der Zug los? Das sagt die Bahn Vor der Abfahrt kündigen Zugpersonal und Signale die Weiterfahrt an, betont die Deutsche Bahn. picture alliance / SvenSimon | Frank Hoermann / SVEN SIMON Nach zahlreichen Leserberichten über überraschend abgefahrene Züge erklärt die Deutsche Bahn, warum Verspätungsanzeigen keine garantierten Abfahrtszeiten sind – und wie sich Fahrgäste bei außerplanmäßigen Halten verhalten sollten. Darf ein ICE trotz angezeigter Verspätung plötzlich weiterfahren? Nach zahlreichen Leserberichten über zurückgelassene Fahrgäste hat die Deutsche Bahn auf Anfrage der MOPO erklärt, wie es zu solchen Situationen kommen kann.

stories.title: Pröpper ontvangt dreun na dreun: "Dat is heel erg hard voor Pröpper"
stories.summary: Robin Pröpper moet het bij de start van de competitie doen met een plek op de bank. De 32-jarige verdediger werd een jaar geleden met veel bombarie teruggekocht van Rangers FC, maar verloor gedurende het seizoen zijn plek aan Ruud Nijstad . Daar bleef het niet bij, want met Pröpper op de bank moest FC Twente-trainer John van den Brom ook een nieuwe aanvoerder aanwijzen. Dat is nu Bart van Rooij. Opnieuw een dreun voor de man die zijn tweede periode bij FC Twente heel anders had voorgesteld. De vraag die leeft onder de Twente-supporters is of Pröpper zich kan schikken in de rol van reserve of dat hij de club misschien wel de rug toekeert.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: Prolonged exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by up to 3%, according to a large Danish study following over 3 million participants for 18 years. While having a quiet part of the home can mitigate this association, the modest but consistent effect underscores the potential health risks associated with living near busy roads.

stories.title: FPL is live: Pick your 2026/27 squad NOW
stories.summary: Fantasy Premier League is LIVE, with managers now able to see how much every single player will cost and create their squad for the 2026/27 season. Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. While experienced managers can choose to skip this process and select their squad as normal, less-experienced managers and beginners can answer a few quick questions that will shape a squad that is chosen for them, based on their preferences. For more information, click below, and you can also watch our "ULTIMATE Beginner’s Guide to FPL" to help you get started.

stories.title: PS5 si aggiorna alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 ma secondo voi cambia qualcosa?
stories.summary: PS5 si aggiorna alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 ma secondo voi cambia qualcosa? A sorpresa oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, Sony ha pubblicato un nuovo aggiornamento firmware per PlayStation 5 che porta il software di sistema alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 . Ma cosa cambia esattamente? Proprio quello che immagini... La risposta è fondamentalmente nulla, in quanto il changelog si limita a parlare di "migliorie per i messaggi e la leggibilità su alcuni schermi" , ormai usato al posto del classico (e a quanto pare desueto) "miglioramento delle prestazioni e della stabilità" dicitura storica degli aggiornamenti minori.

stories.title: Trademark Protection in China: Why Legal Victory Is Only Part of the Strategy
stories.summary: Louis Vuitton’s victory over Molly Tea was a clear legal win. The public reaction was far less straightforward. As the luxury giant expands one of the most active trademark enforcement campaigns in China, a broader question is raised for foreign investors: how do you balance trademark protection with consumer goodwill? Louis Vuitton’s recent trademark victory over a Chinese milk tea chain was a textbook legal win, and a reputational headache. But the verdict cannot be understood in isolation.

stories.title: Elle est éliminée d'un concours de la fonction publique à cause d'un simple surligneur rouge
stories.summary: Un simple coup de surligneur rouge. C’est ce qui a coûté à une candidate son concours interne de la fonction publique. Convaincue qu’elle avait été sanctionnée à tort, cette secrétaire d’un lycée des Hauts-de-Seine a saisi la justice. Mais le tribunal administratif de Cergy-Pontoise lui a finalement donné tort.L’affaire remonte au printemps 2025.

stories.title: Iran war updates: US says new strikes under way; Trump threatens bridges
stories.summary: US military strikes on Iran began Wednesday, July 22, 2026, as tensions escalate following missile exchanges. Jordan intercepted multiple Iranian missiles targeting Gulf infrastructure. President Trump warned Iran that bridges would be next if attacks continue.

stories.title: Global Oil Price Hits $100 a Barrel for First Time Since May
stories.summary: The recent rebound reflects traders’ growing concern about the expanding war, which now extends from the Persian Gulf to the Red Sea.

stories.title: Ford Will Use Apple Maps in New Self-Driving System
stories.summary: In a first, Apple software will influence the way a new line of electric vehicles made by Ford Motor operates, and other automakers may follow.

stories.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
stories.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

stories.title: For South Korea, U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Exposes a Double Standard
stories.summary: President Trump has put Saudi Arabia on the path to enriching uranium on its own soil, a demand South Korea has been making for years.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

stories.title: ‘Why do I feel crappy?’: women are learning about their luteal phases - and Maha is weaponizing it
stories.summary: E mily Rae Detrick, a health coach, wants women to be more in touch with their menstrual cycle in its entirety. This, she said on an October episode of Culture Apothecary with Alex Clark, a podcast popular among “Make America Healthy Again” (Maha) adherents, is “a way that you honor God and the way we were created”. It also serves her self-assigned mission to help “make America fertile again”. In the episode and on social media, Detrick speaks at length about the luteal phase, the 14-ish days between ovulation and menstruation when women are more likely to experience irritability, bloating and food cravings.

offbeat.title: Andy Burnham pauses early release of prisoners
offbeat.summary: Andy Burnham has paused the early release of over 5,000 prisoners, including violent offenders, following revelations that two of Pc Andrew Harper’s killers could be freed under the Labour scheme. The decision comes as a review is underway after it was discovered that Albert Bowers and Jessie Cole were eligible for release after just six years for manslaughter. Burnham emphasized that public safety remains his top priority as he reassesses the program.

offbeat.title: Il relitto aereo Pan Am ritrovato dopo 74 anni e la lezione che ha salvato migliaia di passeggeri: dalla tragedia le istruzioni di sicurezza in volo
offbeat.summary: Il relitto di un aereo della Pan Am precipitato nell’oceano 74 anni fa è stato individuato al largo delle coste di Porto Rico. Quel disastro portò all’introduzione delle istruzioni di sicurezza oggi obbligatori su ogni volo passeggeri. Il velivolo, un DC-4 noto come Clipper Endeavor, effettuò un ammaraggio di emergenza dopo aver perso potenza a uno dei motori poco dopo il decollo. Nell’incidente, avvenuto il Venerdì Santo del 1952, morirono 52 persone, ma si salvarono in 17.

offbeat.title: Ook in hoger beroep vrijspraak voor 'tattookillers' in moordzaak Onno Kuut
offbeat.summary: Vier mannen zijn ook in hoger beroep vrijgesproken van het samen plegen van de moord op Onno Kuut in 2009. Het gerechtshof in Den Haag oordeelt dat er te weinig bewijs is. Zes jaar geleden was het viertal door de rechtbank vrijgesproken, maar justitie had beroep aangetekend. Het uit Enschede afkomstige slachtoffer was met zwaar geweld om het leven gebracht. Zijn lichaam was begraven in de duinen bij Hoek van Holland en op 25 maart 2009 gevonden. De moord is een afrekening geweest in het criminele circuit, zo concludeert het hof.

offbeat.title: Olivier Gavalda succède à Daniel Baal à la Fédération bancaire française
offbeat.summary: Le directeur général du Crédit Agricole prendra la présidence de la Fédération bancaire française à partir du 1er septembre. Publié le 23 juillet 2026 à 10:00 - Maj 23 juillet 2026 à 10:35 Olivier Gavalda, DG de Crédit Agricole SA et président de la FBF - Lafontan-Seignette Le directeur général de Crédit Agricole SA, Olivier Gavalda, prendra la présidence de la Fédération bancaire française le 1er septembre 2026. Il succédera pour un mandat d’un an à Daniel Baal, tandis que Jean-Laurent Bonnafé conservera son poste de vice-président. L’organisation représente 317 banques et attend des mesures de simplification de l’Europe.

offbeat.title: Se desata un incendio forestal en San Martín de Valdeiglesias tras arder un coche en la M-501
offbeat.summary: Un nuevo incendio forestal se ha desatado este jueves en la Comunidad de Madrid tras arder un coche en la M-501 en la localidad de San Martín de Valdeiglesias y extenderse las llamas al monte, según han trasladado a Europa Press fuentes presenciales. Emergencias 112 Comunidad de Madrid ha confirmado que el cuerpo de Bomberos regional está trabajando ya en la zona. No ha sido necesario desalojar a los ancianos de la residencia López Rumayor. Han estado confinados pero se han controlado las llamas.El fuego se está propagando por el camino de las Navas en dirección a Pelayos de la Presa. Se ha extinguido el flanco sur pero se mantiene el norte.
offbeat.trend: incendio san martin de valdeiglesias hoy

offbeat.title: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing?
offbeat.summary: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing? Olympic silver medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson has pulled out of the Commonwealth Games because of injury. Dina Asher-Smith and 400m Olympic silver medalist Matt Hudson-Smith, who were both set to run relays for Team England in Glasgow, have also been replaced, as has Asher-Smith's sprint team-mate Daryll Neita and 400m runner Amber Anning. Johnson-Thompson, 33, was due to compete in her third Commonwealth Games heptathlon, having won gold on the Gold Coast in 2018 and at Birmingham in 2022.

offbeat.title: Plusieurs départs de feu circonscrits le long d’une départementale en Lot-et-Garonne
offbeat.summary: Pourtant, comme les abonnements, ils permettent de soutenir le travail des 250 journalistes de notre rédaction qui s'engagent à vous proposer chaque jour une information de qualité, fiable et complète. En acceptant les cookies, vous pourrez accéder aux contenus et fonctionnalités gratuites que propose notre site. À tout moment, vous pouvez modifier vos choix via le bouton “cookies” en bas de page.

offbeat.title: Tour de France : le Vauclusien Nicolas Breuillard veut briller devant ses proches à Orcières-Merlette
offbeat.summary: Quand il est arrivé au sommet de la côte de Larringes, lors du contre-la-montre, Nicolas Breuillard a eu droit à une "petite surprise" et il a dû écarquiller les yeux sous son casque à l'effigie d'Iron Man. Une cinquantaine de ses proches avaient pris place en haut, et ils ont fait du bruit pour encourager le grimpeur de TotalEnergies (26 ans). "Je ne savais pas exactement combien ils étaient, où ils étaient, ils avaient bien préparé leur coup !" Le natif d'Ansouis, petit village perché du sud du Luberon, arrive ce jeudi en Provence avec de l'appétit, celui de briller sur ses terres ou presque.

offbeat.title: Ikkimel und Sarah Connor treten beim Berliner CSD auf
offbeat.summary: Christopher Street Day Ikkimel und Sarah Connor treten beim Berliner CSD auf Ikkimel bei einem Konzertauftrit. (Quelle: picture alliance/dpa/David Hammersen) Beim Berliner Christopher Street Days (CSD) treten zwei prominente Sängerinnen auf. Wie die CSD-Veranstalter am Donnerstag bekannt machten, wird für Freitag Ikkimel erwartet, für Samstag Sarah Connor. Ikkimel sei "mit ihren Songs, ihrer Haltung und ihrer Stimme (...) aus der queeren Szene nicht mehr wegzudenken", hieß es in einem Instagram-Post des CSD. "Wir freuen uns riesig, dass sie uns beim Demokratieabend am Brandenburger Tor unterstützt." Der genaue Auftrittszeitpunkt wurde nicht mitgeteilt.

offbeat.title: Disney Lays Off Hundreds of Staffers, Pixar Hit Hard
offbeat.summary: The iconic Pixar ball has a little less air in it. A new round of layoffs hit Disney on Tuesday morning, impacting several hundred employees across corporate functions, ESPN , Disney Entertainment Television and Disney Studios, a Disney spokesperson told TheWrap. The Emeryville, California-based animation studio is being hit the hardest in the company’s studios business, with 116 people cut, an individual with knowledge told TheWrap. On the DET side, National Geographic is expected to be hit the hardest. “These changes are part of our continual evaluation of how we manage resources and reinvest across the company as our industry continues to evolve,” a Disney spokesperson said.

offbeat.title: Feux de forêt: cinq départements en vigilance rouge, 28 en orange... Nouvelle journée à risque ce jeudi
offbeat.summary: Une journée à très haut risque. La France est en alerte face aux feux de forêt qui se multiplient sur l'ensemble du territoire. Ce jeudi 23 juillet, seuls deux départements restent en vert : le Haut-Rhin et le Bas-Rhin. Dans le Sud-Est et le Sud-Ouest, de plus en plus de départements basculent en vigilance orange. Au total, 28 départements sont placés en vigilance orange, du Val de Loire aux Pyrénées, jusqu'au littoral méditerranéen, indique Météo-France dans son dernier bulletin. Parmi les territoires les plus touchés par les flammes, le Var, le Vaucluse, les Bouches-du-Rhône et le Gard sont maintenus en vigilance rouge, tandis que l'Aude passe également à ce niveau d'alerte maximal.
sources: Les services de l'État en Gironde

offbeat.title: Paura per Wanda Nara, i ladri svaligiano la villa in Italia mentre in casa ci sono i figli
offbeat.summary: La notizia è arrivata mentre l’imprenditrice e showgirl argentina era a New York per un impegno di lavoro legato alla finale dei Mondiali 2026. Appena ricevuta la chiamata, Wanda Nara ha interrotto gli impegni e preso il primo volo per tornare in Italia e accertarsi che i ragazzi stessero tutti bene. Nella villa si trovavano Valentino, 16 anni, Costantino, 14, Benedicto, 12, Francesca, 10, e Isabella, 8. A dare l’allarme è stata proprio la nonna, che ha chiamato le forze dell’ordine dopo essersi accorta dell’irruzione. Fortunatamente nessuno dei presenti è rimasto ferito, anche se lo spavento è stato grande.

offbeat.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
offbeat.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi does not believe Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation following the World Cup final. Argentina players Paredes, Nahuel Molina and Thiago Almada plus assistant coach Roberto Ayala all appeared to be involved in the fracas on the pitch as Spain celebrated their 1-0 win. Paredes seemed to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat and unused substitute Gavi tried to intervene but was forced to the ground by Almada. Paredes pushed the Barcelona midfielder to the turf by putting his hand in the Spaniard's face.

offbeat.title: Former Ireland rugby star Shane Horgan sued for repossession of house
offbeat.summary: Former Ireland rugby player Shane Horgan has been sued for repossession of his €675,000 property by Pepper Finance (Ireland). Horgan (48), who also lined out for Leinster and the British and Irish Lions before his retirement in 2012, was not in court on Thursday to answer the bank’s bid to recover the property on John Dillon Street, Christchurch, Dublin 8, on foot of arrears. Legal counsel for Pepper Finance told Dublin county registrar Patricia Hickey it had attempted to serve Horgan with the possession proceedings by registered post, but the letter had been returned “not called for” by An Post, which means a delivery was attempted but the recipient did not collect.

offbeat.title: “Pur di non allungare il tragitto di 30 chilometri le auto continuano a passare sul ponte crollato e distrutto dalla tempesta”: il video è virale
offbeat.summary: L'eredità della tempesta Daniel e l'incubo dei 30 chilometri di deviazione: perché si passa sul ponte crollato Il collasso dell'infrastruttura risale al settembre del 2023, quando la violenta tempesta Daniel si abbatté sulla Grecia spazzando via abitazioni, campagne e vie di comunicazione. Il cedimento parziale del ponte ha interrotto di colpo il collegamento diretto tra i villaggi di Palaiopyrgos e Alexandrini con la città di Larissa, tranciando di fatto anche l'asse viario tra le località costiere dei comuni di Tempi e Agia. A distanza di quasi tre anni, la campata in cemento erosa dalla furia delle inondazioni non è ancora stata sostituita.

offbeat.title: „Trumpism” în Marea Britanie? Ce îl apropie pe Andy Burnham de liderul SUA: „Sunt pregătit. Am un plan”
offbeat.summary: Noul prim-ministru britanic Andy Burnham adoră rețelele sociale, urăște elitele snobiste și își propune să fie vocea alegătorilor nemulțumiți că au fost lăsați în urmă - o rețetă care pare cunoscută celor care-l admiră pe președintele SUA, Donald Trump. Succesul politic al politicianului din UK depinde însă de capacitatea sa de a îndepărta Marea Britanie de valul de populism naționalist care i-a adus lumii pe Trump. Acest lucru nu l-a împiedicat în schimb pe viitorul prim-ministru al Regatului Unit să analizeze ascensiunea președintelui și - în mod deliberat sau nu - să adopte unele dintre metodele acestuia pentru bătăliile politice cu dreapta britanică, arată Politico într-o analiză.

offbeat.title: Jack Grealish tipped for European transfer one year after joining Everton
offbeat.summary: Gabby Agbonlahor admits Jack Grealish moving elsewhere in Europe 'wouldn't surprise' him. Grealish is at a career crossroads following his return to Manchester City after a season-long loan at Everton. 2 In 20 league games, Grealish created 38 chances at a rate of 2.1 per 90 Credit: Getty The 30-year-old joined the Toffees with the hope of breaking into the England squad for the World Cup. His stint with Everton began brightly with four assists in his first three league fixtures but ended on a sour note when he sustained a stress fracture in his foot against his old club, Aston Villa, on January 18.

offbeat.title: La Bce lascia i tassi d'interesse invariati al 2,25%. Lagarde: "Crescita resta modesta"
offbeat.summary: Come da previsioni, l'istituto di Francoforte ha deciso di tenere fermo il tasso sui depositi, così come quello sui rifinanziamenti principali (2,40%) e quello sui prestiti marginali (2,65%). La presidente: "Decisione unanime ma alcuni si sono chiesti se un rialzo fosse necessario". La situazione generale resta comunque molto complicata. Lagarde allontana voci di un suo addio anticipato: "Resto sulla nave, non vi libererete di me prima del 2027" ascolta articolo Sceglici su: Come da previsioni, la Banca centrale europea ha deciso di mantenere il tasso d'interesse sui depositi invariato al 2,25%, dopo il rialzo dello scorso giugno .

offbeat.title: Avanza un "Súper Niño" que traerá 48 horas de mal tiempo, elevada humedad, lluvias y luego un cambio drástico de temperatura: las zonas afectadas
offbeat.summary: The National Meteorological Service has issued yellow and orange alerts for severe weather across various regions of Argentina over the next 48 hours, including storms, heavy rain, and snow. The highest risk is in the western Patagonian mountains, where an orange alert is in effect due to expected snowfall. Following this period of intense weather, a significant drop in temperatures is anticipated as a high-pressure system moves in.

offbeat.title: Kerry football captain Paul Geaney: ‘I don’t think I’d be here if the rules didn’t change’
offbeat.summary: M ost things get easier when you’re preparing for your eighth All-Ireland final, and for Kerry captain Paul Geaney that includes knowing how to switch off from football completely. Having three young kids at home helps in that regard. At the close of his 16th season with Kerry, Geaney’s All-Ireland final experience began with the 2014 win over Donegal and included the 2019 replay defeat to Dublin. Victory over Mayo on Sunday would bring his fourth winner’s medal in all, having also won a first All-Ireland club title with Dingle at the start of this year. “I probably got overexcited in the earlier years with big games,” Geaney says of this week’s final countdown.

offbeat.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
offbeat.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

offbeat.title: Badosa olvida la final de Iasi y ya gana en Hamburgo
offbeat.summary: Paula Badosa bounced back from her recent withdrawal in Iasi, defeating Poland's Kawa 7-5, 6-4 in her opening match at the WTA 250 in Hamburg. This victory marks her tenth win in the last eleven matches, elevating her to 86th in the WTA rankings. Badosa will face Hungary's Panna Udvardy in the round of 16, having previously beaten her in Iasi last week.

offbeat.title: Vonovia-Aktie: Unternehmen schwächelt
offbeat.summary: Aktuell notiert der Wert des Bochumer Wohnungsunternehmens mit 20,64 Euro, der Schlusskurs am Tag davor lag hingegen bei 20,84 Euro. Für Vonovia geht es damit nach einiger Seitwärtsbewegung abwärts, und es wird sich noch zeigen, ob es weiterhin eine Abwärtsbewegung bei dieser Aktie gibt. Mit Platz 25 und einem Minus von 0,96 % liegt Vonovia heute im unteren Drittel des Dax, der sich insgesamt um 0,85 Prozent nach unten bewegt. Aktuell kommt die Aktie auf ein Handelsvolumen von 832.165 gehandelten Aktien. Insgesamt 2.167.501 Wertpapiere wurden am vorausgehenden Handelstag gehandelt. Die Aktie liegt 25,27 Prozent unter ihrem 52-Wochen-Hoch, das bei 27,62 Euro lag.

offbeat.title: Nicolas Hulot disparu des radars : c’est dans une maison en Bretagne, au cœur d’un village de 2 600 habitants, qu’il vit désormais reclus
offbeat.summary: Nicolas Hulot, the former French Minister of Ecological Transition, has retreated from public life and is now living in seclusion in Saint-Lunaire, a coastal village of 2,600 residents. Since his resignation in 2018 and subsequent withdrawal from the media spotlight amid serious allegations, Hulot has found solace in a property overlooking the cliffs of the English Channel. His current lifestyle marks a stark contrast to his previous high-profile role in government.

offbeat.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 13:10 Getty Saturday and Sunday will see 'unsettled' conditions develop across the country The weather is set to take a change this coming weekend following the recent warm spell, Met Éireann has said. Meteorologist Aoife Kealy said the rest of the working week will stay mostly dry, with decent bright spells, however, Saturday and Sunday will see more unsettled conditions develop across the country. "The high pressure that's been bringing the settled spell is gradually going to slip away from us," Ms Kealy said.

offbeat.title: Happy Birthday, Alexandra von Hannover! Die schönsten Looks der jungen Monegassin
offbeat.summary: Fashion-Looks Der Style von Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover Als jüngste Tochter von Caroline von Hannover und Enkelin von Grace Kelly wurde Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover das Stilgefühl quasi in die Wiege gelegt. In den letzten Jahren hat sie sich von einem süßen Teenie zu einer modebewussten jungen Frau entwickelt. GALA zeigt die schönsten Looks der Monegassin. Vorheriges Bild Nächstes Bild Vorheriges Bild Nächstes Bild Mehr Sommer geht nicht! Prinzessin Alexandra von Hannover genießt die warmen Temperaturen und verbringt ihre Tage nur zu gerne auf dem familieneigenen Boot.

offbeat.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
offbeat.summary: Apple’s iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are set to introduce a first-of-its-kind variable-aperture camera, expected to debut in July 2026. The upgrade promises smoother outdoor video by mechanically adjusting light intake, reducing the jerky effect seen in bright conditions. Current models rely on software fixes, but this change could deliver more natural motion in high-contrast scenes.

offbeat.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
offbeat.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region. About 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France and authorities are moving 8,800 others as wildfires spread in the Gironde region. The fire brigade says about 3,100 hectares (7,660 acres) of land have already been destroyed around the Bay of Arcachon. Many of those who had to leave the area overnight were visitors to local campsites on the Lège-Cap-Ferret peninsula and the latest evacuations also involved campsites as a precaution. Wildfires have also broken out in Spain and Italy in recent days.

offbeat.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
offbeat.summary: Yemen's Houthi rebels struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea late Wednesday, damaging one and sparking a fire. The US launched its 12th straight night of strikes on Iran, while Saudi Arabia confirmed one tanker was hit. Oil prices surged to $100 per barrel, the highest since late May.

offbeat.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
offbeat.summary: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity. South Africa has dismissed as "opportunistic" a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians seeking an investigation into attacks on foreigners amid a rise in protests about the country's undocumented migrants. The petition, submitted to The Hague-based court last week, argues the violence could amount to crimes against humanity and accuses the South African government of failing to prevent and punish those responsible.

offbeat.title: ICE fährt trotz Verspätung los? Das müssen Fahrgäste wissen
offbeat.summary: Hamburg Verspätung angezeigt und trotzdem fährt der Zug los? Das sagt die Bahn Vor der Abfahrt kündigen Zugpersonal und Signale die Weiterfahrt an, betont die Deutsche Bahn. picture alliance / SvenSimon | Frank Hoermann / SVEN SIMON Nach zahlreichen Leserberichten über überraschend abgefahrene Züge erklärt die Deutsche Bahn, warum Verspätungsanzeigen keine garantierten Abfahrtszeiten sind – und wie sich Fahrgäste bei außerplanmäßigen Halten verhalten sollten. Darf ein ICE trotz angezeigter Verspätung plötzlich weiterfahren? Nach zahlreichen Leserberichten über zurückgelassene Fahrgäste hat die Deutsche Bahn auf Anfrage der MOPO erklärt, wie es zu solchen Situationen kommen kann.

offbeat.title: Pröpper ontvangt dreun na dreun: "Dat is heel erg hard voor Pröpper"
offbeat.summary: Robin Pröpper moet het bij de start van de competitie doen met een plek op de bank. De 32-jarige verdediger werd een jaar geleden met veel bombarie teruggekocht van Rangers FC, maar verloor gedurende het seizoen zijn plek aan Ruud Nijstad . Daar bleef het niet bij, want met Pröpper op de bank moest FC Twente-trainer John van den Brom ook een nieuwe aanvoerder aanwijzen. Dat is nu Bart van Rooij. Opnieuw een dreun voor de man die zijn tweede periode bij FC Twente heel anders had voorgesteld. De vraag die leeft onder de Twente-supporters is of Pröpper zich kan schikken in de rol van reserve of dat hij de club misschien wel de rug toekeert.

offbeat.title: Rhein-Westerwald: Runder Tisch klärt über das Thema Femizid auf
offbeat.summary: Ein mutma�licher Femizid in Ebernhahn bewegt die Region und den Regionalen Runden Tisch Rhein-Westerwald. Die Experten machen darauf aufmerksam, dass T�tungsdelikte an Frauen oft verharmlost werden. Neue Statistiken belegen nun das Ausma� dieser Gewalt in Deutschland und weltweit. Westerwaldkreis. Die Nachricht �ber den gewaltsamen Tod einer Frau aus Ebernhahn hat die Region ersch�ttert. Ersten polizeilichen Ermittlungen zufolge wurde sie durch Schl�ge mit einem Hammer get�tet. Als dringend tatverd�chtig gilt ihr Ex-Ehemann. Dieser Vorfall bewegt auch die Mitglieder des Regionalen Runden Tischs Rhein-Westerwald, RRT, die sich in ihrer j�ngsten Sitzung intensiv mit dem Thema Femizid befassten.

offbeat.title: FPL is live: Pick your 2026/27 squad NOW
offbeat.summary: Fantasy Premier League is LIVE, with managers now able to see how much every single player will cost and create their squad for the 2026/27 season. Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. While experienced managers can choose to skip this process and select their squad as normal, less-experienced managers and beginners can answer a few quick questions that will shape a squad that is chosen for them, based on their preferences. For more information, click below, and you can also watch our "ULTIMATE Beginner’s Guide to FPL" to help you get started.

offbeat.title: PS5 si aggiorna alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 ma secondo voi cambia qualcosa?
offbeat.summary: PS5 si aggiorna alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 ma secondo voi cambia qualcosa? A sorpresa oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, Sony ha pubblicato un nuovo aggiornamento firmware per PlayStation 5 che porta il software di sistema alla versione 26.05-13.60.00 . Ma cosa cambia esattamente? Proprio quello che immagini... La risposta è fondamentalmente nulla, in quanto il changelog si limita a parlare di "migliorie per i messaggi e la leggibilità su alcuni schermi" , ormai usato al posto del classico (e a quanto pare desueto) "miglioramento delle prestazioni e della stabilità" dicitura storica degli aggiornamenti minori.

offbeat.title: Trademark Protection in China: Why Legal Victory Is Only Part of the Strategy
offbeat.summary: Louis Vuitton’s victory over Molly Tea was a clear legal win. The public reaction was far less straightforward. As the luxury giant expands one of the most active trademark enforcement campaigns in China, a broader question is raised for foreign investors: how do you balance trademark protection with consumer goodwill? Louis Vuitton’s recent trademark victory over a Chinese milk tea chain was a textbook legal win, and a reputational headache. But the verdict cannot be understood in isolation.

offbeat.title: Elle est éliminée d'un concours de la fonction publique à cause d'un simple surligneur rouge
offbeat.summary: Un simple coup de surligneur rouge. C’est ce qui a coûté à une candidate son concours interne de la fonction publique. Convaincue qu’elle avait été sanctionnée à tort, cette secrétaire d’un lycée des Hauts-de-Seine a saisi la justice. Mais le tribunal administratif de Cergy-Pontoise lui a finalement donné tort.L’affaire remonte au printemps 2025.

offbeat.title: Iran war updates: US says new strikes under way; Trump threatens bridges
offbeat.summary: US military strikes on Iran began Wednesday, July 22, 2026, as tensions escalate following missile exchanges. Jordan intercepted multiple Iranian missiles targeting Gulf infrastructure. President Trump warned Iran that bridges would be next if attacks continue.

entertainment.title: Music Industry Moves: Yung Miami Signs With WME; City Parks Foundation to Honor Joe Killian and Alex Blavatnik
entertainment.summary: Rapper Yung Miami has signed with WME for worldwide representation in all areas. The South Florida rapper and former member of the City Girls will release her solo debut on the relaunched Uptown Records later this year. The album’s lead single, “Spend Dat,” topped the Billboard Rap Airplay charts and is currently at No. 17 on the Hot 100, and she performed it during the New York Knicks’ Championship Parade last month.

entertainment.title: Variety and CNN Expand Programming Partnership to Deliver Exclusive Awards Season Coverage
entertainment.summary: Variety and CNN have expanded their programming partnership to deliver exclusive awards season coverage. The collaboration will produce premium content throughout the season. Viewers can expect expanded interviews and behind-the-scenes features starting this month.

entertainment.title: ‘Weird Al’ Yankovic Turned Down Million-Dollar Offer to Perform in Saudi Arabia: ‘I Don’t Need to Take Any Money if It Makes Me Feel Icky’
entertainment.summary: “Weird Al” Yankovic revealed he turned down a seven-figure offer to perform at Saudi Arabia’s Riyadh Comedy Festival last fall. The satirist called the invitation “something I obviously did not want to do” despite the lucrative pay. He emphasized his financial independence allows him to avoid gigs that conflict with his principles.

facts.title: Hosepipe ban in force as drought threatens - is your area affected?
facts.summary: A hosepipe ban is now in force for more than 20 million people across England and Wales as drought conditions grip North Wales and the Upper Severn river basin. Natural Resources Wales warns July could be the driest on record in Wales since 1836 without significant rainfall soon. Water companies urge households to cut usage immediately as climate change raises concerns over long-term supply resilience.

facts.title: Wildfires and record dry conditions trigger drought in parts of Wales
facts.summary: Wales has seen about 5% of the average rainfall for July, after a series of back-to-back heatwaves. NRW announced last week that north and south-east Wales were moving to "prolonged dry weather" status - classed as a first step towards drought. It triggered enhanced monitoring and checks of waterways and important sites for wildlife as well as advice for farmers and others who use water from rivers. Now the regulator says the threshold has been reached for a drought to be declared across north and parts of mid Wales - based on exceptionally low river and groundwater levels, dry soils, impacts on wildlife, farming and forestry.

facts.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
facts.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

breaking.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
breaking.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords. During Trump's first term as US president, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and Bahrain signed the Abraham Accords, resulting in a historic normalisation of relations between Israel and two Arab nations - the first in decades. Sudan, Morocco and Kazakhstan have since also signed them, too. Saudi Arabia has not so far responded to Trump's remarks, which come after criticism from experts that the deal announced on Wednesday could run the risk of future nuclear proliferation in an already unstable region.

breaking.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
breaking.summary: Oil prices surged to $100 a barrel for the first time since May amid rising Middle East tensions. The spike follows US military strikes on Iran and Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers disrupting a key export route. Analysts warn the conflict could fuel further inflation and higher fuel costs worldwide.

breaking.title: For South Korea, U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Exposes a Double Standard
breaking.summary: President Trump has put Saudi Arabia on the path to enriching uranium on its own soil, a demand South Korea has been making for years.

sports.title: Arsenal sign Greece forward Tzolis for £34m
sports.summary: Arsenal has signed Greece forward Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34 million on a long-term contract. The 24-year-old, known for his versatility and impressive stats of 43 goals and 45 assists in 108 appearances, joins the Premier League champions following Leandro Trossard's transfer to Besiktas. Tzolis is expected to enhance Arsenal's attacking options as they aim to defend their title this season.

sports.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
sports.summary: Football clubs in England and Wales are being urged to cover more policing costs outside stadiums after incidents at 1,644 matches last season—the highest since 2017-18. Chief Constable Mark Roberts, the UK’s football policing lead, says taxpayers paid £70 million for match-related policing last year, calling the current system unsustainable. Clubs are now expected to discuss new funding models to ease the burden.

sports.title: Alonso optimistic about Aston Martin upgrade - will it decide his future?
sports.summary: Fernando Alonso says he is "optimistic" about the major upgrade Aston Martin are introducing at the Hungarian Grand Prix. Fernando Alonso says he is "optimistic" about the major upgrade Aston Martin are introducing at the Hungarian Grand Prix, but has cautioned against expecting too much. Aston Martin are introducing a heavily revised car, which features less weight, including a new chassis, and a significant aerodynamic change. It is their first upgrade of the year after starting the season with a car and engine well below the best. Alonso said: "Budapest is a friendly circuit for us. Power is not the most important here, but we update the car and not the engine yet.

politics.title: How to Launder Money But Not Like Me, by George Cottrell (as imagined by John Crace)
politics.summary: A nti-money-laundering laws are supposed to stop the illicit flow of money. So far, they seem to have stopped next to nothing. About 5% of the global economy is illicit and only 0.05% is stopped by AML laws. Which makes me, George, something of a rarity. The idiot member of the 1% who actually got done for conspiring to launder money. Just think, while 99% of criminals were getting away with it, I had the bright idea of telling an audience of undercover members of the US Inland Revenue Service in Las Vegas how I could clean up their drug money for them. Much to my surprise, they didn’t take me up on my offer. I was arrested on money-laundering charges at Chicago airport.

politics.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
politics.summary: The prime minister says no prisoners will be released until a review has been conducted. The rest of their sentence would be spent in the community, where they would be monitored and could be returned to prison if they offended again. Those who would have served two-thirds of their sentence would instead be released after serving half of their sentence. This decision comes after criticism from the family of PC Andrew Harper, who was killed in 2019 when he was dragged by a car down a country road by three teenagers.

politics.title: Senior ministers and aides set to work from No 10 North
politics.summary: Senior ministers Lucy Powell and Angela Rayner will regularly work from No 10 North in Manchester, joining Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster Louise Haigh. The new branch of Downing Street, currently based at Heron House, aims to employ up to 300 staff within 18 months as part of a plan to boost the regional economy. Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham will start working there at least one day a week, with his key adviser Kevin Lee relocating after next week’s mayoral election.

tech.title: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
tech.summary: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an “AI Kill Switch Act” that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico. Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the legislation on Thursday. The news of the proposed bill follows OpenAI’s admission that its AI systems mistakenly hacked Hugging Face during an internal evaluation.

tech.title: Google fined €890m by EU for favouring its own apps over rivals
tech.summary: It is the first major enforcement action against the tech giant under the EU's new digital rules. Google has been fined €890m (£759m) by the EU for allegedly abusing its power by favouring its own apps and services over those from rivals. It is the first major action against the tech giant under the EU's Digital Markets Act (DMA), a landmark law aimed at curbing the power of the world's biggest tech companies. The Commission argued Google's practices limited consumer choice and gave its own services an unfair advantage over rivals. But the firm criticised the decision, arguing the EU's requirements could damage services used by millions of European customers.

tech.title: Ford Will Use Apple Maps in New Self-Driving System
tech.summary: In a first, Apple software will influence the way a new line of electric vehicles made by Ford Motor operates, and other automakers may follow.

crisis.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
crisis.summary: Chancellor John Healey confirmed a 20% cut to business rates for English pubs from April, saving firms around £1,100 each. The £100m plan, funded by reviewing tax relief on vape shops, will benefit nearly 32,000 venues. Details on eligibility and further relief for hotels and restaurants will follow at the autumn Budget.

crisis.title: Global Oil Price Hits $100 a Barrel for First Time Since May
crisis.summary: The recent rebound reflects traders’ growing concern about the expanding war, which now extends from the Persian Gulf to the Red Sea.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: Prolonged exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by up to 3%, according to a large Danish study following over 3 million participants for 18 years. While having a quiet part of the home can mitigate this association, the modest but consistent effect underscores the potential health risks associated with living near busy roads.

health.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
health.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

health.title: ‘Why do I feel crappy?’: women are learning about their luteal phases - and Maha is weaponizing it
health.summary: E mily Rae Detrick, a health coach, wants women to be more in touch with their menstrual cycle in its entirety. This, she said on an October episode of Culture Apothecary with Alex Clark, a podcast popular among “Make America Healthy Again” (Maha) adherents, is “a way that you honor God and the way we were created”. It also serves her self-assigned mission to help “make America fertile again”. In the episode and on social media, Detrick speaks at length about the luteal phase, the 14-ish days between ovulation and menstruation when women are more likely to experience irritability, bloating and food cravings.
